name: Workshop Zürich: Bus tour to Lucerne
description: Discover Workshop Zürich: Bus tour to Lucerne in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Workshop Zürich: Bus tour to Lucerne in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Day trips
subcategory.description: Find and book a day trip by bus through beautiful Swiss landscapes. Get on and let's go. You don't have to worry about any tedious organization on a day trip and can instead enjoy the ride to the fullest while being chauffeured to your excursion destination. Switzerland's well-developed road network allows excursions to all popular places and natural beauties

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Lucerne: picturesque city view with Chapel Bridge and water, ideal for excursions and relaxation.
Lucerne: Picturesque lake view, historic architecture, gentle mountains, clear sky.
Lucerne: tranquil lake with wooden jetty, surrounded by snow-capped mountains and a picturesque landscape.
Bus tour to Lucerne: Boat trip with a view of the shoreline landscape of Lake Lucerne.
Lucerne: Historic architecture by the water with blooming flowers, ideal for group travel and adventures.
Lucerne: picturesque old town with bridge, river and historic buildings in summer
